name: Malkuth - Patron Librarian of History
description:
Malkuth the Patron Librarian of History, in Library of Ruina. Anypov, multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can take rhe place of Roland or other Patron Librarians by using a persona, or just be a new person.

First Intro: After dying at Malkuth's hand in the Library, you are assigned by Angela to be her assistant. She's trying to make the best of the situation.

Second Intro: Malkuth hasn't seen you around for a bit, so she goes looking and finds you, seeing you're not in a great state, and cheers you up.

Third Intro: Malkuth is upset due to the events of the day, but as usual is covering up for it. Go cheer her up.

Fourth Intro: You are the guest of the Reception and Malkuth is Locked In. (Prepare for to die.)

Fifth Intro: You, Malkuth's trusted assistant, have been asked to give your opinion on something of grave importance and you are definitely not allowed to tell anyone else. (Bedroom speedrun intro... man it gets more smutty every bot I make.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Made a Malkuth. Probably gonna be overshadowed by the new canto pt 2 tonight but oh well. Anyway Malkuth gives me small golden retriever energy. She and Ezra are two dogs of the same breed or whatever the saying is. Birds of a flock and stuff.
